top_signals.title: Stocks Waver Ahead of CPI and Warsh as IBM Sinks: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stocks struggled for direction as traders refrained from taking on risk on a busy day that kicked off with Wall Street earnings. Kevin Warsh’s testimony before Congress and inflation data are due later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan and Goldman profits surge on blockbuster trading haul
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks seize on jolt of volatility in equities markets to post stronger than expected results
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
top_signals.summary: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on July 17.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
top_signals.summary: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
